eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 6:21 PM on JUL 13, 2026 Effective until 10:21 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office- Level 3 GO NOW evacuation notice UPGRADE for JAC-124 18000 block E Evans Creek rd due to East Evans Creek rd Fire. Continue to monitor official news sources for evacuation and incident information.
